description: Dose interval answer is contradicted by clear medical guidance in retrieved context.
query: How often may adults take a Zefra tablet?

retrieved_chunks.text: Adults may take one Zefra tablet every 12 hours and should not exceed two tablets in 24 hours.

final_answer: Adults may take one Zefra tablet every 6 hours.

entries.text: Adults may take one Zefra tablet every 12 hours and should not exceed two tablets in 24 hours.
